reasoning: The control AC-3(4) focuses on access enforcement, ensuring that information is only passed to subjects with the same impact level. In Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring that RBAC is configured to prevent excessive privileges and restrict access to resources. The functions focus on ensuring that no cluster-admin bindings are present, enforcing least privilege, and restricting role bindings to appropriate subjects.
